value.found_quote: On **Windows**, Codex uses the native [Windows sandbox](https://developers.openai.com/codex/windows#windows-sandbox) when you run in PowerShell and the Linux sandbox implementation when you run in WSL2.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes that Codex uses the native Windows sandbox when run in PowerShell, directly substantiating the claim. It is presented as a current capability with no indication of deprecation or sunset.
